name: Ogury
description: Global mobile advertising platform specializing in personified advertising with SDK for in-app brand campaigns.

seo.title: Ogury — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Ogury: Global mobile advertising platform specializing in personified advertising with SDK for in-app brand campaigns.

when_to_use: Running in-app brand campaigns with consented user data
Personified advertising targeting without device identifiers
Scaling brand awareness campaigns across mobile-first markets

pros: Strong brand-safe mobile web and in-app
cons: Personified model has limits vs identity DSPs
review.verdict: Interesting post-IDFA brand DSP, but consent history means diligence is warranted.
review.best_for: Brand advertisers running European mobile campaigns without identity signals.
review.not_for: Performance app marketers needing deterministic install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
